name: OMX Bridge Plugin
description: Registers OpenClaw agent tools that submit, inspect, list, and cancel jobs on a local omx-bridge service.

bridgeUrl.description: Base URL for the local omx-bridge service.

callbackSecret.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for signing callback requests. Must match BRIDGE_CALLBACK_SECRET on the server.

apiToken.description: Bearer token for non-callback bridge routes. Must match BRIDGE_API_TOKEN on the server when set.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each omx-bridge HTTP request.
